rule_description: future probe confirms metadata index file exists
future probe confirms suffix is allowed metadata type
future probe records row or record count
future probe records metadata column names
future probe checks overlap with 15 allowlist columns
future probe checks minimal/preferred event key fields
future probe rejects raw structure suffixes
future probe must not parse raw structures
future probe must not use structure toolkits
future probe does not materialize candidate metadata
future probe can allow mapping gate if schema is usable
